import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let n = match line
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
  when None
    0
  end

  mut a = 0
  mut b = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let t = a + b
    a = b
    b = t
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("fib=#{a}")
end
